overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The journey transitions from a green-lit patio through various urban environments including streets, alleys, and plazas filled with pedestrians and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered patio with overgrown interior view

events.description: red-haired pedestrian passes close to camera from left to right
camera slows briefly while passing seated man at table

agents.ego_description: walking through covered patio area with red hair visible, passing plastic tables and chairs

notable_agents.action: man seated at patio table facing the large overgrown window

entered.detail: large glass window revealing overgrown jungle-like interior with dense foliage and metal framework
scattered white plastic chairs on concrete patio surface
plastic tables matching the chairs arranged in dining sets
green fluorescent tube lights illuminating the patio ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered patio bathed in green fluorescent light. A large window reveals a dense jungle-like interior. The ego walks past scattered plastic patio furniture and a seated man observing the overgrown display.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with neon signage

events.description: exits covered patio onto open street corner with red neon signage
ambient lighting shifts from green to warm red and orange neon tones

agents.ego_description: turning right onto the street and walking along the curved sidewalk past pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman standing near building entrance looking at phone
white sedan parked along the street curb

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading FOODSCAPE mounted on building corner
brown brick building exterior with art deco styling and large dark doors
paved street with white crosswalk markings curving into the distance

segments.scene_description: The ego exits the green-lit patio onto a street corner dominated by a bright red FOODSCAPE neon sign. The environment shifts to warm red and orange neon lighting as the character walks along the curved street past parked vehicles and pedestrians.

events.description: enters narrow alleyway between buildings with food carts
dominant lighting shifts to bright cyan blue from food cart fluorescents

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow passage between buildings passing food vendors and outdoor seating

notable_agents.action: vendor working at outdoor food counter serving customers
customers seated on green stools at food counter eating

entered.detail: metal food cart illuminated by bright cyan fluorescent tube lights
tall futuristic vending machine with glowing blue interface panel
long metal counter with green bar stools and overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The ego enters a narrow alleyway illuminated by cyan fluorescent lights from a food cart. The space is enclosed by tall buildings with an outdoor food counter on the right where customers sit on green stools. A vending machine stands against the left wall.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza with large digital advertisements
ground becomes littered with scattered papers and trash

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza passing various pedestrians and large holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: man in orange jacket walking ahead through the plaza
person with glowing neck implant looking at phone while walking

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying colorful beverage advertisement with cartoon character
large potted palm tree in circular concrete planter
wide tiled pedestrian area with scattered newspapers and debris

segments.scene_description: The ego emerges from the narrow alley into a wide open plaza featuring massive digital billboards displaying animated advertisements. The ground is littered with scattered papers. Palm trees in concrete planters dot the area as various pedestrians walk through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with vehicle traffic and overhead signage

events.description: approaches main road with moving vehicle traffic and overhead neon signs
white sedan drives past on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to busy street with neon overhead signs and orange railings

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving down the street past the camera
pedestrian in red outfit walking alongside the ego

entered.detail: large overhead neon sign reading TURBO spanning across the street
bright orange metal safety railings along sidewalk edge
building facade with Kiroshi neon signage and Japanese text characters

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ego walking along a main street with moving traffic. A large TURBO neon sign spans overhead while orange safety railings line the sidewalk. The Kiroshi building with illuminated signage stands prominently on the right as vehicles drive past on the multi-lane road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban landscape that transitions from an enclosed green patio into a sprawling, brightly lit city center. It begins in a covered area bathed in green fluorescent light, moving past plastic furniture and a man watching an overgrown interior display before exiting onto a curved street corner. As the lighting shifts from green to warm red and orange tones under a bright FOODSCAPE neon sign, the camera follows the character past parked vehicles and pedestrians into a narrow alleyway. The scene then tightens into a cyan-lit corridor featuring a food cart with green stools and a vending machine, before opening up into a wide plaza filled with massive digital billboards, scattered papers, and palm trees. Finally, the camera moves onto a main street with flowing traffic and orange safety railings, passing under a large TURBO sign toward the illuminated Kiroshi building.
